action.reasoning: Observation: Training still failing with ValueError: Image features and image tokens do not match (tokens:476, features:476) in Qwen2VL forward during prompt+full processing. Predict.py is truncated at output write and missing new-token slicing in generate. Analysis: String concatenation for full_text breaks template consistency vs. prompt_text; separate processor calls on non-identical formatted text cause placeholder/feature mismatch despite same image. Using full messages list (user+assistant) + prompt_messages for apply_chat_template ensures exact template match and identical vision token counts. Complete predict.py with generate slicing, matching processor params, full output write. Increase to 256 samples/64 steps for stronger baseline while keeping iter fast (~20s). Decision: Rewrite train.py and predict.py with fixes, run training to save checkpoint, then submit_eval for first grounding_score + time measurement before scaling data/epochs/Lora.
